title: In-memory Implementation of On-chip Trainable and Scalable ANN for AI/ML Applications
abstract: The paper presents an in-memory implementation of on-chip trainable and scalable artificial neural networks for AI/ML applications, addressing the energy consumption issues of von Neumann architecture by performing computations within the memory core.

methodology.focus: Artificial Neural Networks (ANN) for AI/ML applications

results.energy_efficiency: ≈46× more energy efficient per MAC operation compared to earlier classifiers

references.context: Reference to von Neumann architecture issues
In-memory implementations of Convolution Neural Networks (CNNs)
In-memory implementations of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs)
In-memory implementations of machine learning classifiers
Energy cost of memory access in AI/ML algorithms
